description_long: This is a director-style folding chair with a lightweight wooden frame and black fabric seat and backrest. The chair features two armrests made of the same wood as the frame, providing comfort and support. The legs are crossed in an X-shape, typical of portable folding chairs, and include a horizontal footrest bar for added stability. The seat and backrest are made from a taut, durable black fabric, contrasting with the natural wood finish of the frame. The overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, making it suitable for both casual and professional outdoor settings. The chair's construction suggests it is easy to move and store, ideal for temporary seating arrangements.
description: A director-style folding chair with a wooden frame and black fabric seat and backrest, featuring armrests and a cross-legged base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black fabric seat and backrest, wooden armrests, and the X-shaped legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the armrest profile, and the footrest bar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and the crossed wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and leg structure seen in view 1.
